description: Style NoteChic and stylish, this pair of Vigor canvas shoes from adidas is light and comfortable on the feet. In a funky blue combination, it's a great addition to your casual wardrobe.Product DetailsCanvas upper for durability, comfort, breathability and easy maintenance Synthetic leather strips on the sides of the midfoot to represent Adidas' logo and for enhanced midfoot supportLong and padded tongue for comfort Lace-up system for a snug, customised FitDurable rubber toe box and toe guardBrand badge appliqued on the tongue Padded sockliner for all-day comfortEVA midsole for durability and cushioning Durable rubber outsole with circular lugs for maximum traction and gripMaterial and CareCanvasWipe dirt off with a moist clothTo remove tough stains, make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water
